prompt:
A single disposable pH test strip presented on a clean chemistry surface, with distinct segmented color zones and a small droplet test context implying broad-range pH measurement from 0 to 14. The strip should look lightweight and clearly disposable, with simple supporting lab context such as a sample droplet or small dish nearby. Make it unmistakable that this is a paper test strip rather than an electronic probe.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future chemistry aesthetic: soft bench lighting, realistic paper fibers, tiny liquid reflections, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the strip centered and uncluttered so it reads instantly as a consumable pH testing item.
